final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a French romantic bedroom scene with a four-poster bed, sheer canopy drapes, and a vintage vanity table.

Style/medium: photorealistic interior editorial, soft-focus film aesthetic reminiscent of French Vogue boudoir spreads
Composition: wide-angle medium shot from a low, slightly elevated angle capturing the full four-poster bed, vanity, and window in one frame, natural depth of field
Subject: ornate four-poster bed draped with sheer white gauze canopy, antique carved wooden vanity table with oval mirror, rose petals scattered across bedding and floor
Scene/backdrop: Parisian street view visible through tall French windows with sheer curtains billowing gently, classic Haussmann-style facades outside
Lighting/mood: soft diffused morning light streaming through the windows, warm golden-white color temperature, hazy and intimate, elegant yet languid atmosphere
Color palette: ivory and cream as base, dusty rose from scattered petals as accent, warm antique gold on furniture details, pale grey-blue from the Paris morning sky outside
Materials/textures: smooth silk bedding with subtle sheen, translucent gauze canopy fabric, worn patina on vintage wooden vanity, stone or parquet floor with soft shadows
Avoid: harsh shadows, over-saturated colors, modern furniture, cluttered composition, generic hotel room aesthetic
